title: stellaria bifida
intro: Stellaria bifida, also known as split-flower stitchwort, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Caryophyllaceae family. It is a perennial herb native to the mountainous regions of China, and its name refers to the unique split appearance of its white flowers. The medicinal properties of Stellaria bifida include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it useful for treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to promote digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu.
